_comment: Comprehensive FAQ-style policy document for RAG retrieval. Each section covers a distinct topic area with natural language that matches user questions.
account_opening_and_activation: To open an ADX Bank account, visit the registration page and provide your full name, email address, mobile number, and a password. You must be at least 18 years old and a resident of India. A KYC-compliant government ID (Aadhaar or PAN) is required. After registering, a 6-digit OTP is sent to your email — enter it on the verification page to activate your account. Once activated, a SAVINGS account is automatically created for you and a ₹500 joining bonus is credited immediately. If you declared your salary during registration, the salary amount is also credited to your account roughly 2 minutes after activation as a demo feature. The account activation OTP is valid for 5 minutes and you get 3 attempts before it expires.
joining_bonus_and_salary_credit: Every new ADX Bank customer receives a ₹500 joining bonus credited automatically the moment their email is verified and their account is activated — no action needed. If you declared a monthly salary during registration, that salary amount is credited to your account approximately 2 minutes after activation as a simulated salary disbursement. You will receive an email notification for both credits. If you did not declare a salary at registration, no automatic salary credit is applied, but you can add money to your account manually through the wallet feature.
otp_how_it_works: ADX Bank uses One-Time Passwords (OTPs) to secure all sensitive actions: account verification, login, money transfers, add-money transactions, and loan bookings. Every OTP is a 6-digit numeric code sent to your registered email address. An OTP is valid for 5 minutes from the time it is sent. You have a maximum of 3 attempts to enter the correct OTP — after 3 wrong attempts the OTP is invalidated and you must restart the flow to receive a new one. OTPs are never stored in plaintext — only a SHA-256 hash is kept for security. If you did not receive an OTP, check your spam/junk folder first, then restart the process to trigger a fresh OTP.
login_process_and_account_lock: Logging into ADX Bank is a two-step process. Step 1: Enter your registered email and password. Step 2: A 6-digit LOGIN OTP is sent to your email — enter it to complete login and receive your session token. If you enter the wrong password 3 times in a row, your account is locked for 1 hour as a security measure. You cannot attempt any login during this lockout period. After 1 hour the lock is automatically lifted. Your session (JWT token) expires after 30 minutes of inactivity and you will need to log in again. If you forgot your password, use the Forgot Password link — a reset link will be sent to your registered email, valid for 15 minutes.
password_reset_and_forgot_password: If you have forgotten your password, use the Forgot Password option on the login page. Enter your registered email address and you will receive a password reset link. This link is valid for 15 minutes. Click the link, enter your new password (minimum 8 characters), and confirm it. Your password will be updated and all existing active sessions will be invalidated for security. You will then need to log in again with the new password. If you do not receive the reset email, check your spam folder. For further help contact support@adxbank.demo.
fund_transfer_how_to: To transfer money to another ADX Bank account, go to the Transfer page. Enter the recipient's account number, the amount, and an optional description. Click Initiate Transfer — an OTP will be sent to your registered email. Enter the OTP within 5 minutes to confirm and complete the transfer. The amount is debited from your account and credited to the recipient instantly. Transfers are available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week. Minimum transfer amount is ₹1 and the maximum is ₹5,00,000 per transaction. Daily transfer limit is ₹10,00,000. There are no fees for transfers.
fund_transfer_limits_and_restrictions: ADX Bank fund transfers have the following limits: minimum ₹1, maximum ₹5,00,000 per single transaction, and ₹10,00,000 per day across all transfers. Only intra-bank transfers are supported — both the sender and the recipient must have ADX Bank accounts. You cannot transfer money to yourself (same account). Accounts with KYC status PENDING cannot send transfers above ₹50,000. All transfers require OTP verification. Transfer OTPs are valid for 5 minutes with a maximum of 3 attempts. Transfers are processed instantly with no processing fees.
fund_transfer_failed_or_pending: If your transfer fails, your money is not debited — the transaction is marked as FAILED and no funds leave your account. Common reasons for transfer failure: incorrect recipient account number, OTP expired or entered wrongly, daily limit exceeded, or insufficient balance. If you confirmed the OTP but the transfer shows as failed, it is safe to retry — no double-debit will occur. If money was debited but not received by the recipient, contact support@adxbank.demo with your transaction reference. For transfers stuck in PENDING status, allow a few minutes and then refresh — if still pending after 10 minutes, contact support.
add_money_wallet_how_to: To add money to your ADX Bank account, go to the Wallet page. Enter the amount you want to add (minimum ₹1, maximum ₹50,000 per transaction). Click Initiate — an OTP will be sent to your registered email. Enter the OTP within 5 minutes on the confirmation screen to complete the top-up. The amount is credited to your account balance immediately. There are no fees for adding money. The pending add-money session is valid for 5 minutes — if not confirmed within this time, you must initiate again.
add_money_limits: Add Money limits at ADX Bank: minimum ₹1 per transaction, maximum ₹50,000 per single transaction. Daily limit is ₹1,00,000. Monthly limit is ₹5,00,000. If your KYC status is PENDING (not yet verified), your monthly add-money limit is restricted to ₹10,000. To increase your limits, complete KYC verification. Zero transaction fees apply for all add-money operations.
loan_eligibility: To be eligible for an ADX Bank personal loan you must: (1) be at least 21 years old, (2) have a KYC-verified account (KYC status VERIFIED), (3) have declared a monthly salary of at least ₹10,000 during registration. The maximum loan amount you can apply for is 12 times your monthly salary — for example, if your salary is ₹30,000 per month, your maximum eligible loan is ₹3,60,000. Tenure can range from 1 to 24 months. If you do not have a declared salary on your profile, you are not eligible for a loan. Salary can only be declared at the time of registration.
loan_interest_and_emi_calculation: ADX Bank charges 12% per annum (fixed) interest calculated on the reducing balance. The EMI (Equated Monthly Instalment) is calculated using the standard formula: EMI = P × r × (1+r)^n divided by ((1+r)^n − 1), where P is the principal loan amount, r is the monthly interest rate (12% ÷ 12 ÷ 100 = 0.01), and n is the tenure in months. For example: a ₹1,00,000 loan for 12 months at 12% p.a. gives EMI = 1,00,000 × 0.01 × (1.01)^12 / ((1.01)^12 − 1) ≈ ₹8,885 per month. Use the loan simulator on the Loans page to calculate your exact EMI before applying.
loan_application_process: To apply for a loan at ADX Bank: (1) Go to the Loans page and use the simulator to choose your desired amount and tenure — your EMI will be shown instantly. (2) Click Apply to book the loan — a booking ID is created, valid for 5 minutes. (3) An OTP is sent to your registered email — enter it within 5 minutes to confirm the loan disbursement. (4) Once confirmed, the loan amount is credited to your account and the loan contract is created. A 1% processing fee is deducted from the principal at disbursement — e.g. for a ₹1,00,000 loan, ₹99,000 is credited and ₹1,000 is retained as processing fee.
loan_repayment_and_emi: Currently ADX Bank supports EMI payment via the Pay EMI option on the Loans page. Each EMI payment reduces your outstanding loan balance on the reducing-balance method. If an EMI is overdue by more than 30 days, the loan is tagged as Default. If overdue by more than 90 days, it is classified as NPA (Non-Performing Asset). There is currently no foreclosure penalty — you can repay your loan early. For any issues with EMI payments or outstanding balance queries, contact support@adxbank.demo.
loan_processing_fee_and_charges: ADX Bank charges a 1% loan processing fee on the principal amount, deducted upfront at the time of loan disbursement. This means if you borrow ₹1,00,000, your account is credited with ₹99,000 (₹1,000 deducted as processing fee). There are no hidden charges, no annual maintenance fee, and no foreclosure penalty. Fund transfers and add-money operations are completely free. Account opening has no fee.
kyc_status_and_verification: KYC (Know Your Customer) is the identity verification process. At ADX Bank, KYC is completed during registration by providing Aadhaar Card and PAN Card details. After successful email verification, your KYC status is set to VERIFIED. KYC status can be PENDING (not verified yet), VERIFIED (fully verified), or REJECTED. With PENDING KYC: transfers above ₹50,000 are blocked, add-money monthly limit is ₹10,000, and loans cannot be applied for. Re-KYC is required every 2 years to keep your account active. To resolve KYC issues, contact support@adxbank.demo.
account_blocked_or_dormant: Your account can be in these states: Active (normal), Inactive (email not verified), Dormant (no transactions for 12 months), or Blocked (suspended due to policy violation). If your account is Blocked, contact ADX Bank support at support@adxbank.demo with your account details to initiate a review. Blocked accounts cannot perform any transactions. If your account is Dormant, contact support to reactivate it — no transactions are possible on dormant accounts. Inactive accounts become active once email verification is completed.
session_and_jwt_expiry: Your ADX Bank session token (JWT) is valid for 30 minutes. After 30 minutes you will be automatically logged out and must log in again. This is a security feature to protect your account in case your device is left unattended. There is currently no 'remember me' or extended session option. If you experience sudden logouts, it is because your 30-minute session has expired — simply log in again.
transaction_history_and_statements: You can view your full transaction history on the Transactions page. Transactions are shown in reverse chronological order (newest first). Each transaction shows: type (CREDIT or DEBIT), amount, balance after transaction, description, reference type, and date/time. The API supports pagination with a default of 10 transactions per page and a maximum of 50. Transaction history is available for the entire lifetime of your account. For a formal statement, contact support@adxbank.demo.
fees_and_charges_summary: ADX Bank fee structure: Account Opening — FREE. Fund Transfer (intra-bank) — FREE. Add Money (wallet top-up) — FREE. Loan Processing Fee — 1% of principal (deducted at disbursement). Loan Foreclosure — No penalty. Monthly Maintenance — FREE. There are no hidden charges. ADX Bank believes in transparent, zero-fee banking for everyday transactions.
security_and_data_privacy: ADX Bank protects your data with industry-standard security: passwords are hashed with bcrypt (never stored in plaintext), OTPs are stored only as SHA-256 hashes, all session tokens use HS256 JWT encryption. All sensitive actions (login, transfer, add money, loan booking) require OTP verification via your registered email. Your financial data is retained for 7 years after account closure in compliance with regulatory requirements. ADX Bank will never ask for your password, OTP, or full card details over phone or email.
grievance_and_support: For any issue or complaint with ADX Bank, contact our support team at support@adxbank.demo. Support hours are Monday to Saturday, 9 AM to 6 PM IST. We aim to respond within 24 business hours. For urgent issues such as unauthorized transactions or account compromise, email immediately with URGENT in the subject line. For unresolved complaints, reply to the original support thread with ESCALATE in the subject line. ADX Bank is committed to resolving all customer grievances fairly and promptly.
demo_bank_disclaimer: ADX Bank is a demo/simulation banking platform and is NOT a real regulated financial institution. No real money is involved in any transaction. All account balances, transfers, and loans are simulated for educational and demonstration purposes only. ADX Bank is not affiliated with any real bank or financial regulator. Do not use real personal or financial information. This platform is intended for software demonstration, learning, and development purposes only.
